first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the substance of the justification, strengths, and concerns remains the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording, emphasis, and the specific technologies highlighted (e.g., adding Ember.js to concerns) fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not correlated with the change in university. The model's assessment remains focused on the candidate's skills and experience in both cases.
